name: tmux-team
description: Pane-visible Codex team orchestration with tmux, durable inboxes, and app-server wake delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Start and operate pane-visible Codex teams
interface.longDescription: Bootstraps a tmux-visible Codex team with durable inbox state and app-server wake delivery, avoiding tmux prompt injection.
defaultPrompt: Start a tmux-team for this repo.
Coordinate implementer and collector roles for this task.
Show tmux-team status and pending inbox work.
